---
title: "Lady Annette Louisa Scott"
---

## Lady Annette Louisa Scott

**Dates:** (d. 1920)

### Description

daughter of the 3rd Earl of Clonmell

### Biography

She married (1870) Percy La Touche,  brother of Rose La Touche (d.1875).

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
